CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Marrianne Sioson, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Plaintiff represented to the court that the case has settled. Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set for Nov-29-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
